message:
bd-3bxhj.4.7: Post-generation optimization and readability passes

Add codegen_optimize module with 5 optimization passes that run on
EmissionPlan output to improve generated code quality:

- DeadBranchElimination: removes `if false {}`, unwraps `if true {}`,
  marks no-op match arms
- StyleConstantFolding: merges duplicate constant definitions into aliases
- HelperExtraction: extracts repeated render_widget calls into functions
- ImportDeduplication: removes duplicate `use` statements
- WhitespaceNormalization: collapses blank lines, trims trailing blanks

Public API: optimize() and optimize_with_config() with tunable thresholds.
Each pass emits TransformationRecord with before/after snippets for audit.
20 tests covering all passes, determinism, and configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
